stemHtml: To assure safe operations in low visibility conditions, which additional procedures can be followed to permit continued operations?

options.a: Non-precision approach minima can be lowered below 200 ft.
options.b: Increase the lighting intensity of the runway lights in the fog.
options.c: Runway lighting is switched off to assist with the visibility from the flight deck.
options.d: Runway lights can be dimmed to the level that will enhance their visibility in the fog.
